data.name: Home_HeroTitle
data.value: Discover the Best Events in Sofia

data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Concerts, theatre, sports, and much more. Find your next amazing experience!

data.name: Home_NoWeekendEvents
data.value: No events announced for this weekend

data.name: Events_NoEventsHint
data.value: Try adjusting your search criteria or browse all events.

data.name: Details_TicketRedirect
data.value: You'll be redirected to the official ticketing site

data.name: AboutUs_P1
data.value: We created Go Sofia with a simple goal: to make discovering events in Sofia easier, more convenient, and more accessible. In a city as active and diverse as Sofia, there are concerts, festivals, exhibitions, performances, family events, and many other activities happening all the time. Yet this information is often scattered across different websites, social media pages, and local sources, making it difficult to find in one place.

data.name: AboutUs_P2
data.value: With go-sofia.com, we aim to bring together useful and up-to-date event information so that both Sofia residents and international visitors can more easily explore what is happening in the city. Our goal is to help people discover events that match their interests and make it easier to enjoy Sofia's cultural and urban life.

data.name: AboutUs_P3
data.value: We believe that when event information is easier to access, the city becomes more open, more connected, and more enjoyable for everyone — whether you live here or are visiting Sofia for a few days.

data.name: AboutUs_AdvertiseText
data.value: If you are an event organizer and would like to feature your event on the platform or promote it to a wider audience, feel free to contact us about advertising and promotion opportunities at

data.name: Privacy_S1_Text
data.value: This website is operated by a natural person (hereinafter referred to as the "Controller"). For inquiries regarding the processing of personal data:

data.name: Privacy_S2_Intro
data.value: When using the website, we may collect the following personal data:

data.name: Privacy_S2_DoNot3
data.value: Does NOT collect IP addresses for identification

data.name: Privacy_S3_Intro
data.value: We collect and use personal data for the following purposes:

data.name: Privacy_S3_Item4
data.value: Sending system emails (e.g. registration, password reset)

data.name: Privacy_S3_Item5
data.value: Sending information about new events (only with user consent)

data.name: Privacy_S4_Intro
data.value: Personal data is processed on the following legal grounds:

data.name: Privacy_S4_Item1
data.value: Performance of a contract – for account creation and maintenance

data.name: Privacy_S4_Item3
data.value: Legitimate interest – for improving the service and recommendations

data.name: Privacy_S5_Item1
data.value: For as long as the user account exists

data.name: Privacy_S5_Item2
data.value: Until it is explicitly deleted by the user

data.name: Privacy_S5_UserRights
data.value: Users have the ability at any time to:

data.name: Privacy_S5_UserRight2
data.value: delete their account (and all associated data)

data.name: Privacy_S6_Intro
data.value: Personal data may be processed by:

data.name: Privacy_S6_Item1
data.value: Hosting provider (Microsoft Azure – within the EU)

data.name: Privacy_S6_Item2
data.value: Email delivery service (for system messages only)

data.name: Privacy_S6_Note
data.value: Data is NOT sold and is NOT shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

data.name: Privacy_S7_Intro
data.value: The website may use cookies for:

data.name: Privacy_S7_Note
data.value: When analytical tools are used, they will be configured in accordance with applicable data protection requirements.

data.name: Privacy_S8_Intro
data.value: Under GDPR, you have the right to:

data.name: Privacy_S8_Item3
data.value: delete your data ("right to be forgotten")

data.name: Privacy_S8_Item6
data.value: receive a copy of your data

data.name: Privacy_S8_Note
data.value: You can exercise these rights through your account settings or by contacting the Controller.

data.name: Privacy_S9_Text
data.value: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

data.name: Privacy_S10_Text
data.value: This policy may be updated from time to time. We recommend reviewing it periodically.

data.name: Register_PasswordHint
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a special character

data.name: ForgotPassword_Subtitle
data.value: Enter your email to reset your password

data.name: ForgotPasswordConfirm_Lead
data.value: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.

data.name: ForgotPasswordConfirm_Hint
data.value: Please check your inbox and click the reset link. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

data.name: ResetPasswordConfirm_Lead
data.value: Your password has been reset successfully.

data.name: ResetPasswordConfirm_Hint
data.value: You can now log in with your new password.

data.name: RegisterConfirm_DevClickLink
data.value: Click the link below to confirm your account:

data.name: RegisterConfirm_DevDocs
data.value: See this documentation for how to configure a real email sender.

data.name: RegisterConfirm_CheckEmail
data.value: Please check your email to confirm your account.

data.name: RegisterConfirm_SentLink
data.value: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link in the email to activate your account.

data.name: ResendEmail_Subtitle
data.value: Enter your email to resend the confirmation link

data.name: AccessDenied_Subtitle
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource

data.name: AccessDenied_Alert
data.value: If you believe this is an error, please contact the administrator.

data.name: Lockout_Subtitle
data.value: Your account has been temporarily locked for security reasons

data.name: Lockout_Alert
data.value: Please try again later. If you believe this is an error, contact support.

data.name: ExternalLogin_EnterEmail
data.value: Please enter an email address below to complete your registration.

data.name: Login2fa_Description
data.value: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your 6-digit code below.

data.name: LoginRecovery_Subtitle
data.value: Use your recovery code to access your account

data.name: LoginRecovery_Alert
data.value: You requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide an authenticator app code or disable 2FA.

data.name: LoginRecovery_Hint
data.value: Recovery codes are long alphanumeric codes provided when you enabled 2FA

data.name: Logout_Prompt
data.value: Click the button below to log out of your account

data.name: Logout_Success
data.value: You have successfully logged out of your account.

data.name: Manage_SetPassword_Info
data.value: You do not have a local password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: Manage_PersonalData_Info
data.value: Your data: Your account contains personal data you have provided. This page lets you download or delete that data.

data.name: Manage_PersonalData_Warning
data.value: Warning: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account and cannot be recovered.

data.name: Manage_Delete_Warning
data.value: Warning: This will permanently remove your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Manage_Delete_PasswordPlaceholder
data.value: Enter your password to confirm deletion

data.name: Manage_Delete_PasswordHint
data.value: We need your password to confirm this action

data.name: Manage_Delete_Permanent
data.value: This action is permanent and cannot be reversed

data.name: Manage_ExternalLogins_AddHint
data.value: Connect another social account to make logging in easier

data.name: Manage_2FA_Subtitle
data.value: Secure your account with additional authentication

data.name: Manage_2FA_NoCodesAfterLink
data.value: before you can log in with a recovery code.

data.name: Manage_2FA_GenerateLink
data.value: generate a new set of recovery codes

data.name: Manage_2FA_EnableHint
data.value: Enable it to add extra security to your account.

data.name: Manage_2FA_PrivacyHint
data.value: You must accept the privacy and cookie policy before you can enable two-factor authentication.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Subtitle
data.value: Add extra security to your account

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Info
data.value: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Step1Hint
data.value: Download one of these authenticator apps:

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Step2
data.value: Step 2: Scan QR code or enter key

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Step2Hint
data.value: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the key manually:

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_ManualKeyHint
data.value: Spaces and casing do not matter

data.name: Manage_EnableAuth_Step3Hint
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app:

data.name: Msg_ExternalLogin_ConfirmLoadError
data.value: Error loading external login information during confirmation.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmEmail_Success
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmEmailChange_Success
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email change.

data.name: Msg_ResendEmail_Sent
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Msg_Manage_PhoneUnexpectedError
data.value: Unexpected error when trying to set phone number.

data.name: Msg_Manage_EmailChangeSent
data.value: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Msg_Manage_EmailVerificationSent
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Msg_Manage_EmailSendFailed
data.value: We couldn't send the verification email. Please try again later or contact support.

data.name: Msg_Manage_2faDisabled
data.value: 2FA has been disabled. You can re-enable 2FA when you set up an authenticator app.

data.name: Msg_Manage_2faBrowserForgotten
data.value: The current browser has been forgotten. When you log in again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2FA code.

data.name: Msg_Manage_AuthenticatorVerified
data.value: Your authenticator app has been verified.

data.name: Msg_Manage_AuthenticatorReset
data.value: Your authenticator app key has been reset. Configure your authenticator app using the new key.

data.name: Msg_Manage_RecoveryCodesGenerated
data.value: You have generated new recovery codes.

data.name: Msg_Manage_ExternalLoginNotRemoved
data.value: The external login was not removed.

data.name: Msg_Manage_ExternalLoginNotAdded
data.value: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.
